subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence to Our servant who was imprisoned in My path and whom the ungodly drove forth for his turning unto the Kaaba of My Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا عبدنا الذی حبس فی سبیلی و اطردوه المشرکون لاقباله الی کعبه امری
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
